heroHeadline: Russia Hits Odesa Maternity Hospital; Ukrainian Drones Strike Yaroslavl Refinery 700km Deep
heroSubtitle: 273 Russian drones hit Ukraine overnight — 2 killed in Odesa as maternity hospital roof struck; Ukraine's 3rd night of Baltic oil terminal attacks; Zelensky in UAE; UK pledges $133M air defense; Rubio dismisses Donbas deal reports
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
